findingDetails.title: Retry-manager marker boundary lacks a direct regression assertion
findingDetails.evidence: The retry-manager tests around runBackgroundJob assert the empty-queue return shape and generic object return, while the implementation-critical marker boundary is in retry-manager.ts:1030-1055 and the spec requires the embedding queue beginMaintenance call only after the empty-queue guard.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a focused retry-manager test that redirects DATABASE_DIR to a temp dir, exercises an empty runBackgroundJob tick, and asserts .maintenance-active.json is absent; optionally add a busy-queue case that asserts the marker is present during processing.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Grep for beginMaintenance under mcp_server/tests found only maintenance-marker.vitest.ts, so the shared module is covered but retry-manager wiring is not directly asserted.
